feed.title: SAP Community - BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing
feed.subtitle: BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Connection between SAP BW and Jupyter Notebook
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I don't know the SAP world well and I need your advice.
I need to connect some procedures located on SAP BW (SAP HANA DB) with a data science platform containing Jupyter Notebooks. The goal is to exploit SAP BW data from Jupyter Notebooks for analysis.

I found on internet various solutions to do this:
- connection between the two environments using connectors such as 'JDBC' or 'ODBC';
- connection via api/web services exposed by SAP BW and read by Jupyter Notebook;
- using SAP-specific libraries in Python such as 'pysapbex';
- connection between SAP BW and Jupyter Notebook using 'i-OhJa';
- connection using 'OLAP BAPIs'

I would like to ask you what you think is the best way to extract data from SAP HANA via jupyter notebook, so would appreciate any advice to achieve the goal!
Thank you so much!

entry.title: Can anyone guide me how to post customer incoming payments through bapi code in sap?
SAP BW - Inventory Data Load ADSO
entry.content:
Hello Guru's
Currently we have two data flows for inventory.. one is the old process through infocubes and recently we created new adso's dataflows.
My client wants to maintain both infocube data flow as well new adso dataflow .
Interms of data loading. The standard process
We will lock the users, clear the delta queues and load the infocube dataflow first.
For loading new dataflow to adso..
Should I run the Bx then bf and um ? If I do will the inventory totals through old dataflow through infocube is disrupted / will not match against ecc?

How to handle this data loading process??

Thank you very much.

entry.title: what is subsequent credit note in miro
Authorization privileges between BW4HANA and HANA database
entry.content:
We are setting for our company all the security task that we need in order to fill the requeriments.

We are facing some problem casuistic, we have for the different users(200) 6 differents infoobject that are relevant of authorization. For each infoobject we have 100 possible different values.

The purpose of this its to consume this privilege in HANA database by Analytical privileges so we need to replicate the authorization created in BW on our HANA layer.

The way that we are creating this scenario is one row for each combination,(screenshot)

Is there any other way to set this because we are going to have thousands of rows.

#BW4HANA #ANALYTICALPRIVILEGE

entry.title: how duplicate vendor invoice handled in SAP
entry.content:
Hello,

How duplicate vendor invoice check handled by SAP.

entry.title: calculated key figure, fixed aggregation by characteristic
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

i have from a sales ADSO (Advanced DataStore Object) in an SAP BW/4HANA environment. This dataset is structured to track sales related to individual articles. Each article is categorized under a 'Universe' (a group of articles), and each 'Universe' falls under a broader category called 'Segment'.

with a query, i need a key figure that aggregate the sales value ONLY on the Univers level. 

for the example below, it should calculate the sales value of spring and display it against the sales value of all articales without being influenced by the drill down in the query.

even if a sub articale is added (MCVT) to the query the sales value total shouldn't change

how can i achieve this with a calculated key figure on a composite provider?

 

thank you for your helo

entry.title: Gateway connection created
entry.content:
we have issue with Gateway connection from Rep server to Ase server.

when we login to rep server and execute the ("connect to rssd") statement, we were able to connect to Ase server without any issues.

we are facing the issue while we are trying to establish the connection thru JDBC. As soon as, ("connect to rssd") statement is executed, it is throwing error as gateway connection created and getting terminated. ( if we execute only replication commands (admin who) without connect statement it is working)

is there any approach for JDBC connection?

is there any thing we have to mention in interface file?

is there any this change in connection string ?

entry.title: Ways to create persistent data in SAP BW/4HANA
entry.content: What are how we can create persistent data in SAP BW/4HANA?

entry.title: SAP Analysis: How to filter different reports sharing the same Datasource
entry.content:
I am using the SAP Analysis Office Add-In in Microsoft Excel.

I created two reports based on the same Datasource (I created the second via the components tab, selected the datasource, right clicked and selected Insert Crosstab).

However, changing filters for one report always changes the filters for the other report as well. Please assist by pointig me into the correct direction so that different filters can be set.

The idea is to have multipe crosstabs showing different information but using the same datasource. When changing the period via prompt my expectation is that all reports using this Datasource will update and display the figures of the chosen period.

entry.title: SAP BW Analysis Authorizations on the ADSO data?
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I would like to understand, if it is possible to have the SAP BW Analysis Authorization concept on the ADSO data i.e. without creating the Composite provider or query?

 

There is an external system connected to BW which directly access the ADSO tables to retrieve the data. It is required to enable the data authorizations on the ADSO data.

 

Thanks.
